name: BioGend Therapeutics Co., Ltd.
summary: BioGend Therapeutics Co., Ltd. develops regenerative bio-orthopaedic medicines. It is developing BiG-001 and BiG-006, an osteo-inductive bone graft substitute; and BiG-009, an autologous chondrocyte repair system. The company is also involved in developing bio-orthopaedic devices and treatment methods to fulfill unmet clinical needs. BioGend Therapeutics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
